nasb.text: These are the sons of Reuel: Nahath and Zerah, Shammah and Mizzah. These were the sons of Esau’s wife Basemath.

esv.text: These are the sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah. These are the sons of Basemath, Esau’s wife.

cnv.text: 流珥的兒子是拿哈、謝拉、沙瑪和米撒。這些人是以掃的妻子巴實抹的子孫。

ccb.text: 流珥的儿子是拿哈、谢拉、沙玛和米撒，他们都是以扫妻子巴实抹的子孙。

csbs.text: 流珥的儿子是拿哈、谢勒克、沙玛、米撒。 这些是以扫的妻子巴实抹的子孙。
